mapper.update: UPDATE category_attribute SET category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, value_type = #{valueType}, required = #{required}, searchable = #{searchable}, multi_value = #{multiValue}, sort = #{sort}, unit = #{unit}, options = #{options}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM category_attribute WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, category_id, name, value_type, required, searchable, multi_value, sort, unit, options, created_at, updated_at FROM category_attribute WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, category_id, name, value_type, required, searchable, multi_value, sort, unit, options, created_at, updated_at FROM category_attribute WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY sort
SELECT id, category_id, name, value_type, required, searchable, multi_value, sort, unit, options, created_at, updated_at FROM category_attribute WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND name = #{name}
